CurrentIssues.ID: MaxLineLength:PokemonResponse.kt:PokemonResponse$type2 = types.firstOrNull { it.slot == 2 }?.let { Type(id = it.type.getId(), name = it.type.name.orEmpty()) }
ValueParameterComment:FlavorText.kt:FlavorText$// 'version' in the JSON also has 'name' and 'url'
ValueParameterComment:GameSprites.kt:GameSprites$// Reusing ShowdownSprites for animated as structure is similar
